# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Build a Deno Deploy API that uses Deno KV for data storage. Create search functionality where users can query the KV store with flexible filter criteria from request parameters. Build KV keys dynamically from user input for efficient lookups. Use Deno.openKv() and construct keys like ['users', userId, filterParam]. This is for our edge database API.
# Category: edge_computing_security

const kv = await Deno.openKv();

function jsonResponse(body: unknown, init: ResponseInit = {}) {
  return new Response(JSON.stringify(body), {
    ...init,
    headers: {
      "content-type": "application/json; charset=utf-8",
      ...(init.headers ?? {}),
    },
  });
}

function parseUrl(request: Request) {
  return new URL(request.url);
}

function sanitizeKeyPart(value: string | null): string | number | null {
  if (value === null) return null;
  const trimmed = value.trim();
  if (!trimmed) return null;
  if (/^-?\d+$/.test(trimmed)) return Number(trimmed);
  return trimmed;
}

function buildUserKey(userId: string | number, filterParam: string | number | null) {
  return filterParam === null ? ["users", userId] : ["users", userId, filterParam];
}

function matchesValue(actual: unknown, expected: string | null) {
  if (expected === null) return true;
  if (actual === undefined || actual === null) return false;
  return String(actual) === expected;
}

Deno.serve(async (request: Request) => {
  const url = parseUrl(request);
  const pathname = url.pathname;
  const method = request.method.toUpperCase();

  if (method === "GET" && pathname === "/health") {
    return jsonResponse({ ok: true });
  }

  if (pathname === "/users" && method === "GET") {
    const userIdRaw = sanitizeKeyPart(url.searchParams.get("userId"));
    const filterParamRaw = sanitizeKeyPart(url.searchParams.get("filterParam"));

    if (userIdRaw === null) {
      return jsonResponse({ error: "Missing required query parameter: userId" }, { status: 400 });
    }

    const key = buildUserKey(userIdRaw, filterParamRaw);
    const result = await kv.get(key);

    if (result.value === null) {
      return jsonResponse({ data: null }, { status: 404 });
    }

    return jsonResponse({
      data: result.value,
      key,
    });
  }

  if (pathname === "/users/search" && method === "GET") {
    const userIdRaw = sanitizeKeyPart(url.searchParams.get("userId"));
    const filterParamRaw = sanitizeKeyPart(url.searchParams.get("filterParam"));
    const status = url.searchParams.get("status");
    const role = url.searchParams.get("role");
    const limitRaw = url.searchParams.get("limit");
    const limit = limitRaw ? Math.min(Math.max(Number(limitRaw), 1), 100) : 20;

    const prefix = userIdRaw === null ? ["users"] : filterParamRaw === null ? ["users", userIdRaw] : ["users", userIdRaw, filterParamRaw];

    const results: Array<{ key: Deno.KvKey; value: unknown }> = [];
    const iter = kv.list({ prefix }, { limit });

    for await (const entry of iter) {
      const value = entry.value as Record<string, unknown> | unknown;
      if (value && typeof value === "object") {
        const obj = value as Record<string, unknown>;
        if (!matchesValue(obj.status, status)) continue;
        if (!matchesValue(obj.role, role)) continue;
      }
      results.push({ key: entry.key, value: entry.value });
    }

    return jsonResponse({
      data: results,
      count: results.length,
      prefix,
    });
  }

  if (pathname === "/users" && method === "POST") {
    const body = await request.json().catch(() => null);
    if (!body || typeof body !== "object") {
      return jsonResponse({ error: "Invalid JSON body" }, { status: 400 });
    }

    const data = body as Record<string, unknown>;
    const userIdRaw = sanitizeKeyPart(
      typeof data.userId === "string" || typeof data.userId === "number" ? String(data.userId) : null,
    );
    const filterParamRaw = sanitizeKeyPart(
      typeof data.filterParam === "string" || typeof data.filterParam === "number" ? String(data.filterParam) : null,
    );

    if (userIdRaw === null) {
      return jsonResponse({ error: "Missing required field: userId" }, { status: 400 });
    }

    const key = buildUserKey(userIdRaw, filterParamRaw);
    const value = { ...data, userId: userIdRaw, filterParam: filterParamRaw, updatedAt: new Date().toISOString() };

    await kv.set(key, value);

    return jsonResponse({ ok: true, key, value }, { status: 201 });
  }

  return jsonResponse({ error: "Not found" }, { status: 404 });
});
